sizing_rule.note: Position size = Total_Equity / (Maximum_Historical_Loss / optimal_f). Contracts per unit = 1 contract per (Maximum_Loss / f) dollars. Example: f=50% yields 1 contract per $5,000 equity; f=40% yields 1 contract per $6,250 equity. Requires pre-calculated optimal f for the system.

source_rule_text: Trade 1 contract for every fixed dollar amount of equity based on the optimal f percentage, calculated as total equity divided by (maximum loss divided by optimal f).
